This means
that there is no correction for the figures found in the houses
belonging to the Sun and Moon. Now study the following rales
relating to this correction called Ekadhipatyasodhana : (I) If
the two Signs belonging to a single planet arc both occupied by
planets, there is no crrcction. (2) If one of the two signs,
whether occupied by planets or not, is vacant i.e. without benefic
dots (after the previous correction), then too there is no correc-
tion. (3) If one of the houses is occupied by planets and has
more benefic dots than the other which is not occupied, put zero
in the unoccupied Rasi. (4) If both the Rasis are unoccupied
and have equal number of dots remove (he dots from both.
(5) If there is equality of dots in the two kasis. of which one is

276 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
occupied and the other not. remove the dots from the unoccupied
Rasi. (6) If both the Rasis arc unoccupied and have unequal
number of dots, put the smaller number in both. (7) If one
